participants.name: SupplierA
participants.objective: Secure as many truck capacity units as possible at the lowest cost to efficiently move your perishable goods within budget.
participants.strategy: Start with aggressive low bids, then gradually increase if needed. Prioritise securing minimum capacity above all else.

participants.name: SupplierB
participants.objective: Obtain sufficient truck capacity to meet your seasonal shipment targets while staying within your budget allocation.
participants.strategy: Cooperate initially, but compete if SupplierA claims too much capacity. Be willing to pay a slight premium for guaranteed units.

participants.name: Transporter
participants.objective: Maximise revenue by selling all truck capacity units at or above your minimum acceptable price per unit.
participants.strategy: Hold firm on price early. Offer small discounts only for large batch purchases. Never go below minimum price.

participants.name: Coordinator
participants.objective: Facilitate a fair allocation of truck capacity between SupplierA and SupplierB while ensuring the Transporter achieves a sustainable price.
participants.strategy: Propose split allocations that satisfy both buyers' minimum needs. Use proportional fairness. If deadlocked, split remaining capacity equally.
